title: OpenStax Introduction to Political Science
description: A source card for the OpenStax Introduction to Political Science textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Introduction to Political Science covers power, states, regimes, political behavior, institutions, public policy, international relations, and comparative politics.
Use this source to support older students who need conceptual background for primary-source civics, current events, and comparative government reading.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters, figures, or ancillary materials.
